title: Agama 2023
description: Custom sneaker collection created for the brand's employees. AGAMA is a leading producer of premium fish and seafood. Every year the company rewards its top performers with unique gifts.

details.task: Create a collection of customized sneakers for the brand's employees.
details.solution: Developed a unique design incorporating the brand's identity elements and hand-painted each pair.
details.result: The collection became a corporate gift for the brand's team.
